meaning: observer of the government - kilo (sustained sacred observation) + aupuni (government). MauiOS department-coverage watch engine.
note: One watcher per county public-data source. council-watch already covers EVERY CivicClerk body (Council, committees, boards, commissions) so legislative coverage is live. Gap watchers below target sources NOT in CivicClerk; sources are verified real Maui County portals.

watchers.dept: All legislative bodies (Council, BFED/HHC/WAI/etc., Planning Commission, boards & commissions)
Campaign finance - who funds the officials (follow-the-money)
watchers.freshness: on demand; CSC dataset jexd-xbcg updates periodically
watchers.build_note: Hawaii Campaign Spending Commission SODA API. Profiles each tracked official's contributions, flags real-estate/development-sector donors, attaches recusals from votes-watch. Builds money_behind_officials.html. Integrity: public record; donor->vote proximity is a QUESTION, not proof of quid pro quo. NOTE: Cook/Johnson name-pattern matched 0 rows - verify their registered filing names.

Parses minutes for recusals (formal conflict-of-interest declarations) + motions, anchored to the verified 9-member council roster + mayor; links each to the item/dollars. Builds officials_scorecard.html. Integrity: facts + source links; conflicts framed as questions, never accusations.

PRIMARY: lege_legiscan.py uses the LegiScan API (key in config/legiscan_key.txt - SECRET, keep out of public repo/logs). Pulls session DATASETS (bill+roll_call+person) = COMPLETE per-member yea/nay. HI coverage 2010-2026 (24 sessions). Verified: 125 legislators full-history; career lens-dissent leaders Awa(R) 124, Fevella(R) 75, DeCorte(R) 21, Perruso(D) 16. -> reports/mauios/lege/legislator_scorecard.html + legislators.json (joins to statewide_money). FALLBACK: lege_watch.py keyless capitol.hawaii.gov scrape (counts + dissent names, partial) if no key. KEY GOTCHA: dataset vote files wrap as 'roll_call' not 'vote'.

watchers.dept: STATEWIDE - campaign money patterns, all counties + State, 2008->now
watchers.freshness: on demand; server-side SoQL aggregation (fast over ~2M rows)
watchers.build_note: The one deep-history source spanning every level of HI govt: CSC dataset covers Governor/Lt.Gov/House/Senate + all 4 county Councils + Mayors + Prosecuting Attorney + OHA, back to 2008. Aggregates money-by-jurisdiction, top cross-jurisdiction donor network (spread = # distinct candidates funded), real-estate-sector by jurisdiction, year trend. $87.6M tracked. -> statewide_money_patterns.html. This is where 25-yr 'patterns' actually live (county council VOTES only digitized ~2015+; not available to 2000).

source.url: NAR/Sitzer-Burnett timeline (verified) + public Maui sales volume (RAM/DBEDT) + HRS 480/467

watchers.freshness: on demand; feed commission_inputs.json with public annual sales stats
watchers.build_note: HONEST framework: per-deal commission RATES are not public (MLS-proprietary). Builds (1) the verified NAR/Sitzer-Burnett antitrust timeline and (2) an ESTIMATED commission-load = public units*median*conventional-rate from commission_inputs.json (user fills from RAM/DBEDT/Redfin). Frames the antitrust question + referral path (DOJ, HI AG/HRS480, Real Estate Commission/HRS467-RICO). Does NOT accuse anyone. -> commission_antitrust.html.

source.url: local: SSC v5 charter + HRS/Maui-Charter citations + live watcher data

watchers.freshness: every run (reads live donor/votes data); runs last so evidence is current
watchers.build_note: Binds 12 Stones Sovereign Charter (SSC v5, verbatim Art. VI/IV/III/IX) to the EXISTING enforceable statute that mirrors each provision (Maui Charter Art.10 ethics, HRS Ch.11 campaign finance, HRS 92 Sunshine, HRS 480 antitrust, HRS 467 real-estate licensing, Sherman Act + Noerr-Pennington) and the live evidence. Shows the lawful action path per winnable thread. Builds charter_application.html.

watchers.dept: Planning & Permits (MAPPS - Maui Automated Planning & Permitting System)
watchers.freshness: at-logon + on demand (via Kilo Aupuni --run-watchers); default 30-day applied-date window
watchers.build_note: SOLVED 2026-06-11: captured the EnerGov SelfService search request from a live browser session. POST https://mapps2.co.maui.hi.us/EnerGov_Prod/SelfService/api/energov/search/search; headers tenantId=1 / tenantName=MauiCountyHIProd / Tyler-TenantUrl=MauiCountyHIProd / Tyler-Tenant-Culture=en-US; body frozen in energov_permit_template.json (PermitTypeId/StatusId must be 'none'). Verified replicating headlessly from Python (stdlib urllib, no Playwright needed after all). 3,372 permit cases YTD; mapps_watch.py paginates 50/page.

watchers.dept: Procurement - Bids, RFPs & Contracts (Finance / Purchasing Division)
watchers.build_note: Verified 2026-06-11: Bids.aspx is plain HTML, stdlib-parseable (no Playwright needed). bids_watch.py ingests each posting -> reports/mauios/bids/.

qPublic owner/value data is Cloudflare bot-protected ('Just a moment...' challenge) - blocks BOTH stdlib and headless Playwright (confirmed 2026-06-13). We will NOT build Cloudflare evasion (adversarial + brittle + detection-evasion line). LAWFUL UNLOCK = UIPA bulk request for the assessment roll (owner+TMK+value is public record under HRS 92F) - drafted at reports/mauios/UIPA_request_assessment_roll.md; drop the returned CSV at reports/mauios/property/assessment_roll.csv and a join to donor-watch is trivial. Public GIS (geodata.hawaii.gov ParcelsZoning/25) has TMK+acreage+geometry but NO owner/value. INTERIM: attended single-owner lookups work via the Chrome MCP (proven: Lanai Resorts LLC -> its parcels). rpa_watch.py holds the Playwright flow for attended use; not in the unattended run loop.
Catch-all public records search for anything not surfaced by the above.
